articles.description: Portland Trail Blazers (38-38, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Clippers (39-36, eighth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Clippers face the Trail Blazers on 5-game win streak

articles.description: Charlotte Hornets (39-36, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Brooklyn Nets (18-57, 13th in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Charlotte takes on Brooklyn for conference showdown

articles.description: Philadelphia 76ers (41-33, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Miami Heat (39-36, ninth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Miami plays Philadelphia on home slide

articles.description: Detroit Pistons (54-20, first in the Eastern Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (59-16, first in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Oklahoma City looks for 60th win this season in matchup with Detroit

articles.description: Boston Celtics (50-24, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Atlanta Hawks (42-33, sixth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Celtics play the Hawks, look for 4th straight win

articles.description: New York Knicks (48-27, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Houston Rockets (45-29, sixth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Houston plays New York in non-conference matchup

videos.description: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander pulls up from the corner and knocks down a short jumper early.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA cooks up short jumper for the Thunder) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: SGA cooks up short jumper for the Thunder

videos.description: Jaden McDaniels knocks down a corner 3-pointer for the Timberwolves in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaden McDaniels drops in a corner 3 for the Wolves) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaden McDaniels drops in a corner 3 for the Wolves

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander drives to the rack and drops in a tough layup for Oklahoma City.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA forces his way in for a Thunder layup) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: SGA forces his way in for a Thunder layup

videos.description: Anthony Edwards flies along the baseline for a smooth layup for the Timberwolves.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Anthony Edwards goes baseline for a layup) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Edwards goes baseline for a layup

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander quickly comes to a stop inside the 3-point line and drops in a jumper for the Thunder.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA stops on a dime for a bucket) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: SGA stops on a dime for a bucket

videos.description: Isaiah Hartenstein bounces a pass to Isaiah Joe, who throws down a dunk for Oklahoma City.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Hartenstein finds Joe for a Thunder jam) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hartenstein finds Joe for a Thunder jam

videos.description: Terrence Shannon Jr. cruises to the basket and throws down a huge dunk over Chet Holmgren.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Terrence Shannon Jr. throws it down over Chet Holmgren) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Terrence Shannon Jr. throws it down over Chet Holmgren

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander nearly loses the ball, but recovers in time to knock down a midrange jumper.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA recovers and drains a midrange jumper) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: SGA recovers and drains a midrange jumper

videos.description: Anthony Edwards kicks it to Julius Randle in the corner, who knocks down a 3-pointer for Minnesota.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Anthony Edwards finds Julius Randle for a trey) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Edwards finds Julius Randle for a trey

videos.description: Anthony Edwards maneuvers his way to the rim and drops in a slick floater in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Anthony Edwards rattles in floater for the Wolves) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Edwards rattles in floater for the Wolves

videos.description: Lu Dort gets the ball in the corner and sinks the 3-pointer for Oklahoma City.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Lu Dort cashes in on a corner trey for OKC) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lu Dort cashes in on a corner trey for OKC

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander stays hot as he steps back to knock down a jumper for the Thunder.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (SGA steps back for a smooth jumper) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: SGA steps back for a smooth jumper

videos.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's layup is off the mark, but Isaiah Hartenstein is right there for a putback reverse dunk.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Hartenstein cleans up SGA's miss with a reverse jam) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hartenstein cleans up SGA's miss with a reverse jam

videos.description: Chet Holmgren pulls up for a 3-pointer over Rudy Gobert and drains it for Oklahoma City.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Holmgren drops in a 3-pointer over Gobert) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Holmgren drops in a 3-pointer over Gobert

videos.description: Anthony Edwards pulls up from beyond the arc and banks in the 3-pointer for the Timberwolves.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Anthony Edwards banks in a big 3 for Minnesota) 2025/11/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Edwards banks in a big 3 for Minnesota
